creator: trebestie@gmail.com
text:
Manufacturer: Asrock
Model: ConroeXfire-eSata2
Link: http://www.asrock.com/mb/overview.asp?Model=ConRoeXFire-eSATA2
Audio: don't work
Network: using autodetected card (if_re driver) it's unstable. No way to browsing Google site.

Fix: 

Audio works with experimental snd_hda driver.
Network works with driver provided by Realtek (ftp://202.65.194.18/cn/nic/rtl_bsd_drv_v172.tgz)
How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD AMD64 (or i386)
